prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约27256名、52955名（当年出现明显断档）、35802名、24862名、23836名。2022年因断档位次异常偏大，2023年 快速回升，2024–2025年连续两年位次前移（数字减小），近两年累计前移约1026名，2025年基准位次约23836名，呈回暖趋稳态势；该校在浙江省综合类招生计 划2021年48人、2022年47人、2023年46人、2024年47人、2025年55人，2025年较前四年扩招约8–9人；2026年计划55人，与2025年持平，无扩缩变动，对竞争 格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在第79–83名区间（2026年第80名），宣城校区与本部同属一个办 学体系，学历证书一致，层次定位明确；该校近年声誉信号偏负面：2023年涉及副校长实名举报事件，2025年出现热门专业投档线暴跌舆情，2026年又有学术不 端通报；抖音综合热度排名第77位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，整体报考关注度未出现明显升温信号；合肥工业大学第五轮学科评估中" 管理科学与工程"获评A，为该校唯一A级学科；宣城校区招生专业以工科为主（软件工程、电气工程与智能控制、机械工程等），虽未直接对应A级学科，但依托本部工科底蕴，对 考生仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在浙招生专业中，软件工程（对应计算机类）社会热度"高热推荐"，电气工程与智能控制（对应电气类）"高热推荐"，智能科 学与技术（对应电子信息类）"高热推荐"，新能源材料与器件（对应能源动力类）"推荐"，这些热门专业有助于吸引高分考生；但网络与新媒体（对应新闻传播类）"明显劝退"， 机械工程（对应机械类）"分化观望"，专业热度分化明显。浙江省综合类考生数2021年25.3万→2025年29.1万，持续增长；2026年全省普通高考总人数约40万（口径含所有类型） ，按近年综合类占比估算约30–31万，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。；该校位于安徽省宣城市，与浙江省相邻，地理距离较近，跨省就读接受度较高；但宣城校区作为异地校区，在浙江考生中的地域偏好弱于合肥本部，招生计划中浙江省 占比不高，属外省招生常态。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次连续前移的回暖趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、浙江省考生规模持续扩大、学校声誉偏负面但热门专 业热度较高等多重因素：招生计划不变不构成额外竞争压力，考生增加使整体竞争加剧但该校近年热度回升部分对冲，声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考意愿。预计2026年最低录取位 次在2025年基准23836名基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测约24036名，区间23536–24536名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约24036名，区间23536–24536名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报（机械工程、经济学、新能源材料与器件），一档专业（软件工程、电气工程与智能控制、 智能科学与技术）作为冲刺志愿，三档专业（过程装备与控制工程、能源化学工程、英语）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如23500名以内）可重点冲刺一档热门工科专 业；位次接近区间上限（如24500名左右）应以三档保底为主，兼顾二档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Province comprehensive category were approximately 27256, 52955 (a significant gap occurred that year), 35802, 24862, and 23836. In 2022, due to the gap, the ranking was abnormally high; in 2023, it quickly rebounded; in 2024–2025, the ranking moved forward for two consecutive years (number decreased), with a cumulative forward movement of about 1026 in the last two years; the 2025 baseline ranking is about 23836, showing a warming and stabilizing trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Province comprehensive category was 48 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 55 in 2025; in 2025, it expanded by about 8–9 compared to the previous four years. The 2026 plan is 55, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable in the 79–83 range in recent years (80th in 2026). The Xuancheng Campus shares the same educational system as the main campus, with identical degree certificates, and a clear level positioning. In recent years, the university's reputation signals have been somewhat negative: in 2023, there was a real-name report incident involving a vice president; in 2025, there was public sentiment about a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors; in 2026, there was a notice of academic misconduct. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (rated as 'average'), with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, and overall application attention has not shown a clear warming signal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hefei University of Technology's 'Management Science and Engineering' was rated A, the only A-level discipline at the university. The Xuancheng Campus enrollment majors are mainly engineering (Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), although not directly corresponding to the A-level discipline, they rely on the main campus's engineering foundation and still have a certain appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Among the majors enrolled in Zhejiang, Software Engineering (corresponding to Computer category) has 'highly recommended' social popularity, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control (corresponding to Electrical category) is 'highly recommended', Intelligent Science and Technology (corresponding to Electronic Information category) is 'highly recommended', and New Energy Materials and Devices (corresponding to Energy and Power category) is 'recommended'. These popular majors help attract high-scoring candidates. However, Network and New Media (corresponding to Journalism and Communication category) is 'clearly discouraged', and Mechanical Engineering (corresponding to Mechanical category) is 'divided and wait-and-see', showing clear divergence in major popularity. The number of comprehensive category candidates in Zhejiang Province increased from 253,000 in 2021 to 291,000 in 2025, with continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in the province is about 400,000 (including all types), estimated at about 300,000–310,000 based on the recent comprehensive category proportion, with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, adjacent to Zhejiang Province, with relatively close geographical distance and high acceptance of cross-province study. However, as a remote campus, the Xuancheng Campus has weaker geographical preference among Zhejiang candidates compared to the Hefei main campus, and the enrollment plan's proportion in Zhejiang Province is not high, which is normal for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the warming trend of consecutive ranking advances in 2024–2025, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the continuous expansion of candidate numbers in Zhejiang Province, the somewhat negative university reputation but high popularity of hot majors: the unchanged enrollment plan does not constitute additional competitive pressure; the increase in candidates intensifies overall competition, but the recent warming of the university's popularity partially offsets this; the negative reputation may slightly suppress application willingness. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward (ranking number increases) based on the 2025 baseline of 23836, with a prediction of about 24036, and a range of 23536–24536.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 24036, range 23536–24536. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Mechanical Engineering, Economics, New Energy Materials and Devices), Tier 1 majors (Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Intelligent Science and Technology) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Energy Chemical Engineering, English) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 23500), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors; for rankings near the upper bound of the range (e.g., around 24500), prioritize Tier 3 as backups while considering Tier 2.
